title: Sergeant Murphy
writer: William Jacobs, Sy Bartlett, Abem Finkel
actors: Ronald Reagan, Mary Maguire, Donald Crisp
plot: A horse is offered for sale to the cavalry but is rejected as unfit for service. A cavalry private buys the horse, and trains it to be a champion racer. When he thinks it's ready, he manages to sneak it into England to race in the...
